MonkeyUI
========

MonkeyUI is a UI/UX knowledge base that helps developers turn reference UI screenshots into structured style DNA (colors, typography, spacing, radii, and shadows) and use that context in AI coding workflows via MCP.

This repository hosts the public marketing website for MonkeyUI.

Official links
--------------
- Website: https://monkeyui.com
- GitHub (website): https://github.com/MonkeyUI-dev/MonkeyUI-www
- GitHub (product): https://github.com/MonkeyUI-dev/MonkeyUI

Supported locales
-----------------
- English: https://monkeyui.com/en
- Simplified Chinese: https://monkeyui.com/zh-CN

Key product messaging
---------------------
- MonkeyUI helps developers produce designer-grade interfaces during AI-assisted coding.
- It provides reusable design context ("style DNA") to improve consistency and quality.
- The website content is focused on evidence, workflow, demo, FAQ, and application onboarding.
